children.heading: State child health plan required
children.label: b State child health plan required

children.text: sets forth how the State intends to use the funds provided under this subchapter to provide child health assistance to needy children consistent with the provisions of this subchapter, and
has been approved under .section 1397ff of this title

children.heading: State entitlement
children.label: c State entitlement
children.text: This subchapter constitutes budget authority in advance of appropriations Acts and represents the obligation of the Federal Government to provide for the payment to States of amounts provided under .section 1397dd of this title

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: No State is eligible for payments under for child health assistance for coverage provided for periods beginning before .section 1397ee of this titleOctober 1, 1997
